Notice Of Motion For Order To Apportion And Distribute Funds
Off Calendar May-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for order to apportion and distribute funds by Plaintiff.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:44:32 P.M. and concluding at 1:48:51 P.M.

Kimberly Chu, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Gart Costa via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Asbestos Deft not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff addresses the Court.

The matter is submitted.
The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, Plaintiff's Motion for Order to Apportion and Distribute is GRANTED.

The following are entitled to distribution of all net funds obtained by their counsel, Brayton Purcell LLP, derived from all funds (both litigation funds and funds from claims against bankrupt asbestos defendant trusts) negotiated after the June 12, 2018, death of GARY COSTA in the following proportions:

Estate of GARY COSTA, deceased: 0%

BONNIE COSTA
as Wrongful Death Heir: 100%

WENDY COSTA
as Wrongful Death Heir: 0%

TOTAL: 100%

The signature of BONNIE COSTA shall be sufficient on all settlement documents for the purpose of settling both the estate claim and the wrongful death claims with defedantns in the filed asbestos personal-injury-survival and wrongful death action and in those claims made against bankruptcy-related trusts established for asbestos victims.

Proposed order signed as modified. (D505)
